plugin.deviceremote.tab.hint: Configure the remote server in plugin settings, then select a device in the Devices list and use Remote control from the plugin menu.
plugin.deviceremote.modal.title: Remote control
plugin.deviceremote.modal.hint: After starting, wait until agent status is ready or sharing, then open the viewer. Opening earlier often causes Disconnected on the first attempt.
plugin.deviceremote.modal.waitReady: Wait for the device: accept screen capture, then wait until agent status becomes ready (TextRoom ICE settles on some devices).
plugin.deviceremote.error.missing.viewer: Agent is ready, but viewer URL is missing. Set Remote server URL in plugin settings, then Start remote session again.
plugin.deviceremote.settings.hint: Use the Headwind Remote (aPuppet) web-admin URL, e.g. https://remote.example.com/web-admin/
